notes:
Milestone after parts 4 (calendar-actions) + 8 (animated-readme-svg) audit-passed. 5/9 criteria done. Director armed the next batch: parts 5 (local-notifications) and 6 (checklist-export-import), each a full RESEARCH -> PLAN -> BUILD -> TEST chain (AUDIT auto-enqueued by the builder).

PIPELINED PAIR, not a naive parallel pair. Both parts register a handler against the SAME untouched-panel action-dispatch seam established by parts 3/4 (window.registerCheffyAction) AND both must append a single bundled <script> import to the SAME trailing region of Cheffy.astro (mirroring the cheffyCalendarActions import at Cheffy.astro lines 244-249). That shared Cheffy.astro mount is a real file collision, so this is NOT zero-shared-files like the part-4/8 pair was. Guard: part 6's BUILD (cheffy_p6_checklist_build) depends on BOTH its own plan AND part 5's BUILD (cheffy_p5_notif_build, audit-passed) -- so the shared Cheffy.astro import edit is serialized (part 6 appends its import BELOW part 5's landed one). Part 6's RESEARCH + PLAN carry NO cross-dependency, so they run in whatever gap the part-5 chain leaves (the coordinator's batch walk falls through to runnable siblings on dep-wait).

PART 5 -- local-notifications: implement public/sw.js (real notificationclick focus/open) + NEW src/utils/cheffyNotifications.ts registering 'trigger-permission' (permission -> SW register('/sw.js') -> schedule this week's cooking-time reminders from the existing #cheffy-week-ics island; Notification Triggers with a setTimeout fallback; clean no-op/degrade where unsupported or denied; handler wrapped so a throw never crashes the panel) + ONE import line in Cheffy.astro. Target Android Pixel + Chrome, NO iOS-specific path. Touch ONLY those 3 files; notifications dialogue node + trigger-permission action already exist -- do NOT re-author cheffy-dialogue.json or touch CheffyPanel.astro.

PART 6 -- checklist-export-import: NEW src/utils/cheffyChecklist.ts registering 'export-checklist' -- JSON + Markdown export of the week's grocery checklist reusing GroceryList.astro's EXACT localStorage key + checked-set (single source of truth, no parallel key), plus a merge/overwrite IMPORT writing back to that same set (+ DOM reflect if GroceryList present) + minimal checklist-node option(s) in cheffy-dialogue.json if the import surface needs them + ONE import line in Cheffy.astro. Do NOT rework CheffyPanel.astro or GroceryList.astro's storage contract.

DEFERRED to the next Director pass (NOT armed here): part 7 reduced-motion -- a cross-cutting CSS sweep across Cheffy.astro/CheffyPanel.astro that must land AFTER parts 5-6 so it covers their new interactive surfaces (and it also touches Cheffy.astro, so it cannot parallelize cleanly with them); part 9 pe-build-gate -- the final <Cheffy /> mount into Layout.astro + npm run build gate, MUST be last (after every interactive surface). Sequence next milestone: 7, then 9.

Durable gate = npm run build (astro check then astro build); no test framework by design -- TEST rungs use ephemeral throwaway Node scripts. Standing CALLBOARD gate (DOM smoke harness) still UNANSWERED -- Director decided NOT to block parts 5-6 on it (same astro-check + cold-audit bar that carried part 4's handler); proceeding as-is. Do NOT duplicate that gate entry.
